data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate child actor restrictions.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of specific child actor restrictions, including school hours, tutoring, and maximum hours on set. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm these restrictions are implemented or validated. The linked use case outlines the requirements but lacks the necessary evidence to assert compliance, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation or validation of child actor restrictions.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add validation for child actor restrictions
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete API calls that verify the implementation of child actor restrictions.
